<includeonly><table class="infobox">
<caption>{{{section|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</caption>
{{#if:{{{title|}}}|<tr><td colspan="2" class="infobox-above">{{{title}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{division|}}}|<tr><th>Division</th><td>{{{division}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{issued|}}}|<tr><th>Issued</th><td>{{{issued}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{rev|}}}|<tr><th>Revision</th><td>{{{rev}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{pages|}}}|<tr><th>Pages</th><td>{{{pages}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{areas|}}}|<tr><th>Areas</th><td>{{{areas}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{precedence|}}}|<tr><th>Precedence</th><td>{{{precedence}}}</td></tr>}}
</table></includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<pre>
{{Infobox spec
| section    = 03 30 00
| title      = Cast-in-Place Concrete
| division   = 03 — Concrete
| issued     = 2025-09-01
| rev        = 0
| pages      = 28
| areas      = [[Area 03|Area 03]], [[Area 04|Area 04]]
| precedence = Governs over drawing notes per General Conditions 1.2.3
}}
</pre>

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude>
